title: Audit ferrolearn-neighbors vs sklearn: close gaps, add API proof tests
description:
Step 2 of 12 in sklearn parity audit (#240).

Scope: sklearn.neighbors (KNeighborsClassifier/Regressor, RadiusNeighborsClassifier/Regressor, NearestNeighbors, KDTree, BallTree, KernelDensity, LocalOutlierFactor, NeighborhoodComponentsAnalysis, KNeighborsTransformer, RadiusNeighborsTransformer, NearestCentroid).

Process: same 5-step audit-fix-prove flow.

Related existing issues: #60 (KNeighborsTransformer/RadiusNeighborsTransformer), #63 (NCA), #64 (KernelDensity), #66 (sparse data support), #67 (precomputed distance matrix), #148 (DistanceMetric class)
